Vecells · PHARM_PATHS

Pharmacy Route Observatory

One bounded view of pharmacy discovery, choice, dispatch, visibility, urgent fallback, and reconciliation. The observatory keeps calmness pinned to proof, not to transport convenience, and keeps Update Record explicitly out of urgent-return semantics.

Filters
Route rail
Decision matrix
Route Purpose Version Freshness Urgent suitability
Consent dependency
Consent and proof ladder
Lane diagram
Compact route split
Route Purpose Consent Update Record scope Closure blocker
Gap and watch strip
